notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras plunked
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras hit by pitch. Jarren Duran to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Dylan Cease on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez grounds into a double play, shortstop Ernie Clement to second baseman Lenyn Sosa to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 2nd. Carlos Narváez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Narváez rally-killer GIDP

notableEvents.label: Tyler Heineman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Heineman grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Davis Schneider out at 2nd. Tyler Heineman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango flies out to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.

notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
